title: ZohoWriterDocument
description: A document object in the Zoho Writer API

document_type.description: Type of document (e.g. fillable, merge, sign)

role.description: Role of the authenticated user with respect to this document

lastmodified_by.description: List of users who last modified the document

created_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the document was created

modified_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the document was last modified

last_opened_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the document was last opened

created_time_in_millisecond.description: Creation time as Unix epoch milliseconds

modified_time_in_millisecond.description: Modification time as Unix epoch milliseconds

is_published.description: Whether the document is publicly published

is_shared.description: Whether the document has been shared

is_favourite.description: Whether the document is marked as a favourite

is_orgpublished.description: Whether the document is published to the organization

open_url.description: URL to open the document in Zoho Writer

published_url.description: Public URL if the document is published

thumbnail_url.description: URL to the document thumbnail image

permissions.description: Access rights for the current user
